title: Cobblemon Modded Drops
description: Makes Cobblemon drop items from other mods
body:
This is a datapack which adds items from other mods to the loot tables of certain Pokemon!
For example, Beedrill can now drop bee stingers from The Bumblezone, and Tatsugiri can now drop salmon/cod rolls from Farmer's Delight.

This should work in all future Cobblemon updates unless there are some major changes to how Minecraft handles datapacks or Cobblemon handles loot tables.

Documentation is no longer maintained because it was a pain, if you wanna see the drops just look at the files. You can also feel free to edit or remove loot tables for your modpack or server, I don't care.

**Integrated mods in v1.2:**
- [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)
- [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight)
- [The Bumblezone](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-bumblezone)
- [Ecologics](https://modrinth.com/mod/ecologics)
- [Spelunkery](https://modrinth.com/mod/spelunkery)
- [The Aether](https://modrinth.com/mod/aether)
- [Alex's Mobs](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-mobs)
- [Alex's Caves](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-caves)
- [Croptopia](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/croptopia)
- [Tetra](https://modrinth.com/mod/tetra)
- [Crabber's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/crabbers-delight)

**v1.3 additions:**
- [Paradise Lost](https://modrinth.com/mod/paradise-lost)
- [Create: Food](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-food)
- [Let's Do series](https://modrinth.com/user/satisfyu)
- [Etcetera](https://modrinth.com/mod/etcetera)
- [Wilder Wild](https://modrinth.com/mod/wilder-wild)
- [RPG Series](https://modrinth.com/user/ZsoltMolnarrr)
- [Ad Astra](https://modrinth.com/mod/ad-astra)
- [Create: Garnished](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-garnished)
- [Create Deco](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-deco)
- [Numismatic Overhaul](https://modrinth.com/mod/numismatic-overhaul)
- [Culinaire](https://modrinth.com/mod/culinaire)
- [Farmer's Respite](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/farmers-respite-fabric)
- [Spawn](https://modrinth.com/mod/spawn-mod)

(Note: Most of these additions are only 1 or 2 items from each of these mods, so you shouldn't expect to have your gameplay totally transformed. It's just meant to be kind of a "Oh hey, Whimsicott actually drops cotton when I have a mod that adds it to the game, cool" thing)

If you use a mod like [Cobblemon Integrations](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-integrations) that lets you see Pokemon loot tables ingame, then you might see some Pokemon without models. This mod doesn't add in any spawning, so you won't actually see those Pokemon in your world. I just added those loot tables for compatibility with addons that DO add them in.

Most of these modifications only add to the Pokemon's loot table without removing anything. Certain Pokemon have drops that are meant to "replace" certain vanilla drops, but an experimental method is implemented to make it so the vanilla drops will still drop when you don't have the mod that adds the replacement item. (This method isn't perfect, so the vanilla drop still has a small chance to drop even if you have the mod.)

Feel free to modify this pack however you want if you're using it in a modpack.
